Campaign
 
Candidate
A Character subclass which extends PoliticalActor and models a Candidate in the Presidential race.
Caucus
 
Character
The most basic form of Character, from which other types of Characters inherit.
CharacterManager
CharacterManager manages the generation, access, control, and interaction of Character classes (including the Player).
CharacterModel
 
ClickableArea
 
CollectionOperations

Container.DrawQuad
 
Convention
 
ConventionCall
A convention call, or call of the convention, is an official document issued by a political party in the year before a party convention.
County
 
Demographics
 
DemographicsManager
DemographicsManager is responsible for generating, storing, and calculating demographic data.
DemographicsManager.DemographicCategory
 
DirectionalLight
 
ElectionResult
 
Engine
Engine is the main driver of the game engine, facilitating the initialization and function of the game by tracking critical details for game settings and other information.
Engine.Difficulty
Dificulty values impact some calculations, impacting the difficulty of the game.

ILogic
 
IOUtil
IOUtil provides methods and constants for Input and Output interactions with Files, Consoles, etc.
IOUtil.Extension
 
IRenderer<T>
 
Issue
 
Jsonic<T>
Interface allowing Json methods to be used to create and store JSONObjects representing instances of classes which implement this interface.
LanguageManager
The LanguageManager tracks the current game language and provides localization for tags.
LanguageManager.Language
Possible languages in which to display game text.
Legislature
 
Legislature.GovernmentLevel
 
LocalOfficial
 
LocalOfficial.LocalRole
 
Logger
 
Main
Main entry point
Manager
Abstract class for game Managers, like MapManager, CharacterManager, etc.
Manager.ManagerState
Possible internal States of a Manager.
MapEntity
Any Entity (Nation, State, Municipality, invalid input: '&c') which appears on the Map is a MapEntity.

Model
 
ModelManager
 
ModelManager.ModelInfo
 
MouseInput
 
Municipality
Municipalities are various types of inhabited places in the United States.
Municipality.TypeClass
TypeClass describes the various classes or levels of local government, which vary by state.
Name
Models the Personal Name of a Character, with options for several Name Forms, Patterns, and Display Options.
Name.DisplayOption
Options for displaying a name.
Name.NameForm
Enum for broader forms of a name, from culture or religion etc.
NameManager
 
Nation
Singleton class holding values for the Nation, or the United States.
NewGame

PoliticalActor
A Character subclass which represents a Character who may interact with political systems, like leaders, lobbyists, or candidates.
PoliticalActor.Education
Enum for Education levels, based on ISCED 9-level framework.
PoliticalActor.PoliticalRole
Roles which a PoliticalActor may hold.

Tracks the base and modified Legislative, Executive, and Judicial skills of a PoliticalActor (or subclass), as well as their Aptitude.

Map entity for the second-largest geographical division, including States, Commonwealths, District, and Territories.
